title: Mixed manual worker chain test v2 / local self-check
objective: Validate the local Golem environment before a delegated worker run.

outputs.content:
SELF-CHECK GOLEM
gateway: OK — gateway activo, runtime running, rpc ok

tabs: WARN — relay activo pero 0 tabs adjuntas

sintesis: el sistema está mayormente operativo pero hay señales a revisar.
